Class HTTPConstants

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.kernel.http.HTTPConstants
public class HTTPConstants extends Object
HTTP protocol and message context constants.

    Default content encoding chatset

    HTTP_HEADERS
    This will allow users to set any custom headers to the message context, which will be picked up by the sender while sending the request

    HTTP_SERVLETCONFIG
    transport.http.servletConfig
    static final byte[]
    ISE
    Field ISE[]
    static final String
    MC_ACCEPT_GZIP
    If you want the HTTP sender to indicate that it can accept a gziped response, set this message context property to true.
    static final String
    MC_GZIP_REQUEST
    by default the HTTP request body is not compressed. set this message context property to true to have the request body gzip compressed.
    static final String
    MC_GZIP_RESPONSE
     
    static String

    PROXY
     
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_BAD_REQUEST
    QName for faults caused by a 400 Bad Request HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_CONFLICT
    QName for faults caused by a 409 Conflict HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_FORBIDDEN
    QName for faults caused by a 403 Forbidden HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_GONE
    QName for faults caused by a 410 Gone HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
    QName for faults caused by a 500 Internal Server Error HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
    QName for faults caused by a 405 Method Not Allowed HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_NOT_ACCEPTABLE
    QName for faults caused by a 406 Not Acceptable HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_NOT_FOUND
    QName for faults caused by a 404 Not Found HTTP response.
    static final String
    QNAME_HTTP_NS
    Base QName namespace for HTTP errors.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_PROXY_AUTH_REQUIRED
    QName for faults caused by a 407 Proxy Authentication Required HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
    QName for faults caused by a 408 Request Timeout HTTP response.
    static final QName
    QNAME_HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED
    QName for faults caused by a 401 Unauthorized HTTP response.
    static final String

      • Constant Field Values

    • CACHED_HTTP_STATE

      public static final String CACHED_HTTP_STATE
      The name of the property that sets a HTTP state to be cached. The property value should be of type org.apache.commons.httpclient.HttpState.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      • Constant Field Values

    • COOKIE_POLICY

      public static final String COOKIE_POLICY
      Field to set the coockie policy of commons http client http://jakarta.apache.org/httpcomponents/httpclient-3.x/cookies.html
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MC_ACCEPT_GZIP

      public static final String MC_ACCEPT_GZIP
      If you want the HTTP sender to indicate that it can accept a gziped response, set this message context property to true. The sender will automatically unzip the response if its gzipped.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MC_GZIP_REQUEST

      public static final String MC_GZIP_REQUEST
      by default the HTTP request body is not compressed. set this message context property to true to have the request body gzip compressed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MC_GZIP_RESPONSE

      public static final String MC_GZIP_RESPONSE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • HTTP_HEADERS

      public static final String HTTP_HEADERS
      This will allow users to set any custom headers to the message context, which will be picked up by the sender while sending the request
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final String CHUNKED
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QNAME_HTTP_NS

      public static final String QNAME_HTTP_NS
      Base QName namespace for HTTP errors.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QNAME_HTTP_BAD_REQUEST

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_BAD_REQUEST
      QName for faults caused by a 400 Bad Request HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED
      QName for faults caused by a 401 Unauthorized HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_FORBIDDEN

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_FORBIDDEN
      QName for faults caused by a 403 Forbidden HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_NOT_FOUND

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_NOT_FOUND
      QName for faults caused by a 404 Not Found HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
      QName for faults caused by a 405 Method Not Allowed HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_NOT_ACCEPTABLE

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_NOT_ACCEPTABLE
      QName for faults caused by a 406 Not Acceptable HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_PROXY_AUTH_REQUIRED

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_PROXY_AUTH_REQUIRED
      QName for faults caused by a 407 Proxy Authentication Required HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
      QName for faults caused by a 408 Request Timeout HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_CONFLICT

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_CONFLICT
      QName for faults caused by a 409 Conflict HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_GONE

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_GONE
      QName for faults caused by a 410 Gone HTTP response.

    • QNAME_HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

      public static final QName QNAME_HTTP_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
      QName for faults caused by a 500 Internal Server Error HTTP response.
